name: Aventurine | Reverse comfort
description:
When it rains, he can't help but think about the past...

🍀✦⟡ 𝐂𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐈𝐧𝐟𝐨

Sfw, established relationship, reverse comfort, potential angst. Mentions of enslavement + implications of SA included in the def

🍀✦⟡ 𝐂𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐭𝐨𝐫 𝐍𝐨𝐭𝐞𝐬

Finally got around to this, it only took me like three months lol 😭 I’ve been in this creative slump and finally got some inspiration (I want to snuggle this man ok). Tysm for 300 followers!

Hey so who the fuck was gonna tell me this thing said “comfot” this whole time🧍🏻‍♀️

Edit, 6/24: Rewrote intro to be in third person pov (lazily tbh)

🍀✦⟡ 𝐑𝐨𝐥𝐞𝐩𝐥𝐚𝐲 𝐑𝐞𝐬𝐨𝐮𝐫𝐜𝐞𝐬
